title: Better Cows!
description: Same ol' cow we love, new model!
body:
Pretty straight-forward. This improves the model & texture of cows! (Mooshrooms included.)

REQUIRES: [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features/versions) & [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

Ported from my PlanetMC page: [Better Cows!](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/better-cows-6330829/)
